converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Hotels Statler Company records
Thurston, Carl G.
4303
5.6 cubic feet. 5.6 cubic feet.
1885-1988. Manuals, instructions, surveys, historical records, publications, newsletters, and memorabilia. Statler standard instruction manuals for accounting and finance, housekeeping, employee training and job descriptions; folders on the history of the hotels, instructions and procedures, wage surveys; sales and convention information; executive training materials; publications, newsletters, and memorabilia. Also includes newsletters and other items relating to the Statler Alumni Club. Collection material in English 2085410
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
M.E. Warren
Date completed:
Feb. 1995
EAD encoding:
Ann Hubert, July 2003
Date modified:
RMC Staff, August 2016
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Statler standard instruction manuals for accounting and finance, housekeeping, employee training and job descriptions; folders on the history of the hotels, instructions and procedures, wage surveys; sales and convention information; executive training materials; publications, newsletters, and memorabilia. Also includes newsletters and other items relating to the Statler Alumni Club.
Cite As:
Hotels Statler Company records, #4303. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Photographs. Hotel housekeeping. Hotels, taverns, etc. -- Finance. Hotels, taverns, etc. -- Employees. Hotel management. Hotels Statler Company Statler Alumni Club

Scope and Contents
Coffee can, ash tray, dinner plate, HEC photograph album, marble paperweight inscribed "Hotel Statler, Buffalo 1923-1984," brick "From the first permanent Statler Hotel" - Hotel Statler, Buffalo, N.Y.Statler GuidesNovember 1937-January 193942Statler Bulletins for Department MeetingsJune 1925-Decenber 192743Statler Bulletins for Department MeetingsJanuary 1928-April 192944Talks to Statler SalesmenJanuary 1929-December 193045Statler SalesmanshipJune 19231931June 193246Talks to Department Heads193846Talks to Room Clerks; Talks to Waiters and Waitresses; Instructions to Room Service Waiters, Bellmen, Maids1929-193946"Be a Clever Cover Girl: A Guide for Statler Waitresses" (2 copies)194947"Inside Statler" (2 copies)195047"Statler Service Codes"- booklets from three different yearsno dates47"The Successful Waitress" - General Foods Corp.196347"Statler Publicity"195847Hotel Statler Booklets from Buffalo, St. Louis, Detroit, Clevelandno dates47Hotel Credit Department Legal Guide and Practical Procedures"- Hotel Association of New York City195847Hotel Statler Personnel Policies194447"The Efficiency Magazine"October 194547"Hotel" the magazine of the hotel workers of New YorkNovember 195047"The New York Hotel Story" - Industrial BulletinFebruary 195147"The Alarm Clock" - Monthly Bulletin issued by the staff of Horwath and HorwathSeptember 192848Service Reports192548General Rules for Employees - Hotel Pennsylvaniano dates48Hotel Management Clipping Bureau of Good IdeasSeptember 194048Statler and Hilton Memo Books for Daily Follow-UpSeptember 192848"When Good Fellows Get Together" - Wines and Liquors ManualSeptember 193348Culinary Glossaries - Spanish, Austro-German, French, Italian - Wine and Food Societyno dates48"Mine Hosts Handbook"193448Hotel McLure - Wheeling, West Virginiano date48"Architecture" - The Waldorf-Astoria HotelNovember 193149Waldorf-Astoria MagazineMarch 1935February 193649Postcards from various Statler Hotels, Statler Corkscrew, Decalsno dates410"The Story of the Los Angeles Statler"1953411Booklet and Menu from Opening of the Statler Center in Los AngelesOctober 1952411Pastel of E.M.
